creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for taking a look, for your speedy review, and for committing a fix.

I don't think the original patch took the "wrong" approach. I think it is clear from the upstream default and the history of our port that OpenSSL is both the default and preferred SSL library.

Switching to a library that compiles cleanly is a certainly fast and convenient approach to get things working again.

In any case, I've also upstreamed the patch to build with OpenSSL 3 and we'll see if upstream decides this is okay. So I guess we will see:

https://github.com/umurmur/umurmur/pull/192
